arts.ttl: Former Bayern Munich assistant coach Dino Toppmöller ready to lead Eintracht Frankfurt against German Rekordmeister
arts.sum: Former Bayern Munich assistant coach Dino Toppmöller is at the helm of Eintracht Frankfurt and will be looking to take down his old club in hopes of keep his current team’s slim Bundesliga title hopes alive. For Toppmöller, who led his team to a 3-3 draw against Bayern Munich earlier this season, the match is going to be a scuffle, despite the perception that Bayern is struggling at the moment.

arts.ttl: Man United 'plotting' intriguing Marcus Rashford 'swap deal' with Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Manchester United allegedly plan to use Marcus Rashford in a bid to sign Bayern Munich midfielder Aleksandar Pavlovic during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Official: Bayern Munich sign their very first youngster from the FC Bayern World Squad
arts.sum: In 2021, Bayern Munich launched FC Bayern World Squad project, which would see countless aspiring professional players send clips of their highlights to Bayern, be evaluated before a small, select U19 group would be chosen each year to go on a multi week training camp with some of Bayern’s staff and former notable Bavarian players and play for a professional contract at either Bayern or another club. And so 16-year-old Maycon Douglas Cardozo signs through 2027 for Bayern’s U-17s via a recent official announcement from the club, joining from Sport Thai-Bavaria Football Academy (STB) in Thailand, an FC Bayern Youth Football Partner since 2015.

arts.ttl: Tottenham loan star on following Harry Kane's lead at Leyton Orient and dream Man City goal
arts.sum: Tottenham legend Harry Kane was Jamie Donley's boyhood idol growing up and now the talented young attacking midfielder is following in his footsteps by shining on loan at Leyton Orient

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Real Madrid and Bayern Munich among elite clubs now ready to pounce on 'world-class' Liverpool player
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm a development in Virgil van Dijk’s camp that could lead to alarm bells starting to ring at Liverpool amid contract...

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich to make big play for Atlético Madrid star?; Kevin De Bruyne, Jack Grealish out, Florian Wirtz in at Manchester City?; Bayern not interested in Antony; AC Milan, Arsenal plotting big moves?; and MORE!
arts.sum: Manchester City will listen to offers for many of their biggest stars players this summer including Kevin De Bruyne and Jack Grealish, the Daily Mirror reports, with Bayer Leverkusen forward Florian Wirtz emerging as a target. In his work for CaughtOffside, Sport Bild journalist Christian Falk says the rumors linking Bayern Munich to Antony (news to us) are not true:

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich legend Karl-Heinz Rummenigge backs Vincent Kompany through thick and thin
arts.sum: Bayern Munich legend Karl-Heinz Rummenigge knows that each coach at the club can relate to the saying, “heavy is the head that wears the crown.” I believe that the players are grateful to Vincent for letting them play the way they had this fun and this success,” Rummenigge told kicker’s Georg Holzner (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: “No favorites” — Bayer Leverkusen exec expects intense battle with Bayern Munich in Champions League
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen managing director for sport Simon Rolfes thinks that his club and Champions League Round of 16 opponent Bayern Munich match-up well. Looking for more thoughts and analysis of Bayern Munich’s Champions League draw of Bayer Leverkusen?

arts.ttl: Preview: Bayern Munich vs. Eintracht Frankfurt - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Bundesliga clash between Bayern Munich and Eintracht Frankfurt, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich execs ready for Bayer Leverkusen battle in Champions League Round of 16
arts.sum: Bayern Munich CEO Jan-Christian Dreesen is excited about his club’s drawing of Bayer Leverkusen in the Champions League . Looking for more thoughts and analysis of Bayern Munich’s Champions League draw of Bayer Leverkusen?
